items.text: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_en: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.

items.text: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.

items.text: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_zh: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_en: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.

items.text: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_zh: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_en: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.

items.text: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_en: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.

items.text: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_zh: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_en: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.

items.text: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.

items.text: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_zh: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_en: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.

items.text: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_zh: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_en: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.

items.text: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_zh: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_en: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.

items.text: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_en: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.

items.text: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_zh: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_en: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.

items.text: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_zh: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_en: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.

items.text: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_en: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.

items.text: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_zh: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_en: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.

items.text: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_zh: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_en: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.

items.text: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_zh: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_en: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.

items.text: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.

items.text: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_zh: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_en: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.

items.text: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.

items.text: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_zh: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_en: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.

items.text: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_en: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.

items.text: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_zh: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_en: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.

items.text: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_en: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.

items.text: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_zh: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_en: Creative exploration gives me more energy.

items.text: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.

items.text: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_zh: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_en: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.

items.text: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_zh: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_en: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.

items.text: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_zh: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.

items.text: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_zh: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_en: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.

items.text: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_zh: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_en: I am willing to listen to others patiently.

items.text: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_en: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.

items.text: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_zh: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_en: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.

items.text: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_en: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.

items.text: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.

items.text: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_en: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.

items.text: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_zh: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_en: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.

items.text: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_en: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.

items.text: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_en: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.

items.text: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_zh: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_en: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.

items.text: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_en: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.

items.text: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_zh: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_en: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.

items.text: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_zh: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_en: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.

items.text: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_zh: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_en: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.

items.text: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_zh: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.

items.text: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_en: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.

items.text: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.

items.text: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_zh: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.

items.text: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.

items.text: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_zh: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_en: I value details and quality checks.

items.text: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_en: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.

items.text: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_zh: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_en: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.

items.text: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_zh: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_en: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.

items.text: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_en: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.

items.text: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_zh: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_en: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.

items.text: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_zh: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_en: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.

items.text: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.

items.text: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_zh: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_en: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.

items.text: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢动手搭建、修理或改装东西。
items.text_en: I enjoy building, repairing, or modifying things by hand.

items.text: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 结果直观、看得见摸得着的任务会吸引我。
items.text_en: Tasks with visible, tangible results appeal to me.

items.text: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.
items.text_zh: 使用工具、设备或机械让我感到自在。
items.text_en: Using tools, equipment, or machinery feels comfortable to me.

items.text: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.
items.text_zh: 比起长时间讨论，我更喜欢直接上手做。
items.text_en: Compared with long discussions, I prefer to get hands-on and do the work directly.

items.text: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢解决机械、设备或技术故障。
items.text_en: I enjoy troubleshooting mechanical, equipment, or technical problems.

items.text: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.
items.text_zh: 我愿意在现场完成需要操作和调整的工作。
items.text_en: I am willing to complete work on site that requires operation and adjustment.

items.text: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.
items.text_zh: 我对器材、结构或系统如何运作很感兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in how equipment, structures, or systems work.

items.text: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.
items.text_zh: 需要手眼协调和实际操作的任务让我有投入感。
items.text_en: Tasks that require hand-eye coordination and practical operation draw me in.

items.text: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.
items.text_zh: 把想法变成实体、样品或可执行成果会让我满足。
items.text_en: Turning ideas into physical objects, prototypes, or executable outcomes feels satisfying to me.

items.text: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.
items.text_zh: 我愿意接触户外、工地、实验场或生产现场类情境。
items.text_en: I am willing to work in settings such as outdoor sites, work sites, labs, or production environments.

items.text: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢分析复杂问题并找出原因。
items.text_en: I enjoy analyzing complex problems and finding their causes.

items.text: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.
items.text_zh: 数据、证据和逻辑会激发我的好奇心。
items.text_en: Data, evidence, and logic spark my curiosity.

items.text: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.
items.text_zh: 做决定前，我倾向先研究再行动。
items.text_en: Before making a decision, I tend to research first and act later.

items.text: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.
items.text_zh: 阅读和理解有难度的概念会让我投入。
items.text_en: Reading and understanding challenging concepts draws me in.

items.text: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢从信息中识别规律或模型。
items.text_en: I enjoy identifying patterns or models in information.

items.text: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.
items.text_zh: 需要严谨思考的工作更容易吸引我。
items.text_en: Work that requires rigorous thinking is more likely to attract me.

items.text: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.
items.text_zh: 面对未知问题，我愿意先提出假设再验证。
items.text_en: When facing an unfamiliar problem, I am willing to form hypotheses and then test them.

items.text: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.
items.text_zh: 比起凭直觉判断，我更喜欢用事实推理。
items.text_en: Compared with judging by intuition, I prefer reasoning from facts.

items.text: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把模糊问题拆解成可分析的部分。
items.text_en: I enjoy breaking vague problems into parts that can be analyzed.

items.text: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.
items.text_zh: 长时间独立思考、研究或探索答案不会让我厌烦。
items.text_en: Long periods of independent thinking, research, or exploration do not bore me.

items.text: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢创造新点子和原创成果。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating new ideas and original work.

items.text: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.
items.text_zh: 表达自我是我工作动力的重要来源。
items.text_en: Self-expression is an important source of work motivation for me.

items.text: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢尝试不同风格和表达方式。
items.text_en: I enjoy trying different styles and ways of expression.

items.text: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.
items.text_zh: 相比固定流程，我更喜欢开放式任务。
items.text_en: Compared with fixed procedures, I prefer open-ended tasks.

items.text: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.
items.text_zh: 视觉、文字、声音或概念设计类工作会吸引我。
items.text_en: Work involving visual, written, audio, or conceptual design appeals to me.

items.text: Creative exploration gives me more energy.
items.text_zh: 创造性探索会让我更有能量。
items.text_en: Creative exploration gives me more energy.

items.text: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把抽象感觉转化为作品、内容或方案。
items.text_en: I enjoy turning abstract feelings into work, content, or solutions.

items.text: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.
items.text_zh: 我愿意从零开始构思，而不是只按模板执行。
items.text_en: I am willing to develop ideas from scratch rather than only follow templates.

items.text: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.
items.text_zh: 当一件事可以做得更有美感或更有个性时，我会更投入。
items.text_en: When something can be made more aesthetic or more personal, I become more engaged.

items.text: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.
items.text_zh: 我享受在没有标准答案的情况下进行创作。
items.text_en: I enjoy creating when there is no single standard answer.

items.text: I enjoy helping others solve problems.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢帮助他人解决问题。
items.text_en: I enjoy helping others solve problems.

items.text: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.
items.text_zh: 我重视团队氛围和人际关系。
items.text_en: I value team atmosphere and interpersonal relationships.

items.text: I am willing to listen to others patiently.
items.text_zh: 我愿意耐心倾听他人。
items.text_en: I am willing to listen to others patiently.

items.text: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 包含辅导、支持或服务职责的角色会吸引我。
items.text_en: Roles that include coaching, support, or service responsibilities appeal to me.

items.text: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.
items.text_zh: 当工作能真正帮助别人时，我会更有成就感。
items.text_en: When work can genuinely help other people, I feel a stronger sense of achievement.

items.text: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢协调多方协作，让事情顺利推进。
items.text_en: I enjoy coordinating collaboration among different people so things move forward smoothly.

items.text: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.
items.text_zh: 我愿意花时间理解他人的需求、情绪或难处。
items.text_en: I am willing to spend time understanding other people's needs, emotions, or difficulties.

items.text: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过沟通让他人更安心、更清晰或更有方向。
items.text_en: I enjoy using communication to help others feel more reassured, clearer, or more directed.

items.text: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.
items.text_zh: 看到别人因我的支持而进步，我会很满足。
items.text_en: Seeing others make progress because of my support feels satisfying to me.

items.text: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢需要合作、陪伴或群体互动的工作场景。
items.text_en: I enjoy work settings that require cooperation, companionship, or group interaction.

items.text: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢通过观点影响他人。
items.text_en: I enjoy influencing others through ideas and viewpoints.

items.text: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.
items.text_zh: 主导推进事项会让我更有动力。
items.text_en: Taking the lead in moving things forward gives me more motivation.

items.text: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢设定目标并推动结果达成。
items.text_en: I enjoy setting goals and driving results to completion.

items.text: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.
items.text_zh: 我能适应谈判、争取资源或说服他人的场景。
items.text_en: I can adapt to situations involving negotiation, resource seeking, or persuasion.

items.text: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.
items.text_zh: 偏商业导向、增长导向的挑战会吸引我。
items.text_en: Business-oriented and growth-oriented challenges appeal to me.

items.text: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.
items.text_zh: 在压力下主动承担责任会让我更有存在感。
items.text_en: Taking responsibility under pressure gives me a stronger sense of presence.

items.text: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.
items.text_zh: 我愿意带头组织资源、人和节奏去完成目标。
items.text_en: I am willing to lead the coordination of resources, people, and pace to achieve a goal.

items.text: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢竞争、突破和把机会变成结果的过程。
items.text_en: I enjoy the process of competition, breakthrough, and turning opportunities into results.

items.text: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.
items.text_zh: 当一个项目需要有人站出来拍板时，我愿意担当。
items.text_en: When a project needs someone to step up and make decisions, I am willing to take that role.

items.text: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.
items.text_zh: 我对市场、业务、创业或对外拓展类任务有兴趣。
items.text_en: I am interested in tasks involving markets, business, entrepreneurship, or external development.

items.text: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.
items.text_zh: 我偏好清晰流程和结构化工作方式。
items.text_en: I prefer clear processes and structured ways of working.

items.text: I value details and quality checks.
items.text_zh: 我重视细节以及质量校验。
items.text_en: I value details and quality checks.

items.text: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢规划安排并跟踪进度。
items.text_en: I enjoy planning, arranging, and tracking progress.

items.text: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.
items.text_zh: 对重复但重要的任务，我能稳定执行并且不排斥。
items.text_en: For repetitive but important tasks, I can execute steadily and do not reject them.

items.text: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.
items.text_zh: 规范、一致性和文档化会让我更安心。
items.text_en: Standards, consistency, and documentation make me feel more secure.

items.text: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢组织、整理和运营执行类工作。
items.text_en: I enjoy work involving organization, sorting, operations, and execution.

items.text: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.
items.text_zh: 我愿意维护台账、清单、记录或标准作业流程。
items.text_en: I am willing to maintain ledgers, checklists, records, or standard operating procedures.

items.text: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.
items.text_zh: 明确规则和职责边界的环境会让我更高效。
items.text_en: Environments with clear rules and responsibility boundaries make me more efficient.

items.text: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.
items.text_zh: 我喜欢把杂乱信息整理成清楚的分类和顺序。
items.text_en: I enjoy organizing messy information into clear categories and sequences.

items.text: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.
items.text_zh: 当事情被安排得井井有条时，我会更有满足感。
items.text_en: When things are arranged in an orderly way, I feel more satisfied.
